name: bioAffinity Technologies, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview We develop noninvasive diagnostic laboratory tests to detect early-stage lung cancer and other diseases of the lung using flow cytometry and automated analysis informed by machine learning, a form of artificial intelligence (AI). Our first commercial diagnostic test, CyPath Lung, identifies and analyzes cell populations using flow cytometry, including cancer and cancer-related cells, that indicate a malignancy in the lung.
